title: abutilon parvulum
intro: Abutilon parvulum, also known as the small flowered abutilon, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, characterized by its small, yellow or orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Abutilon parvulum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
